title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Shoppers Stop

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Shoppers Stop
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Shoppers Stop! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Nashik team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Shoppers Stop:
Shoppers Stop is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shoppers Stop!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
